title: Phase 4A: Customer module - service, API, directory, detail, forms
description: Build the complete customer module: customer service with CRUD/search/credit check, API routes, customer directory page with DataTable, customer 360 detail page with tabbed layout, create/edit dialog, and contacts sub-component.
steps: Create src/lib/services/customer.service.ts with CRUD, search, credit check, tag management
Create src/app/api/customers/route.ts with GET (list/search) and POST (create)
Create src/app/api/customers/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE
Create src/app/(dashboard)/customers/page.tsx with customer directory DataTable
Implement filters: status, branch, sales rep, tags, credit hold status
Include tabs: Profile, Orders, Deliveries, Billing, Collections, Pricing, Sales, Communications
Create src/components/customers/contacts-panel.tsx with contacts list and management
